tasks.title: Analyze ClaudeCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../claude-code-sourcemap to analyze ClaudeCode features. Identify key functionalities, user interface elements, and unique selling points. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/claudecode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze Copilot-CLI Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze Copilot-CLI features and capabilities. Focus on command-line interface design, automation features, and integration capabilities. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/copilotcli_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze OpenCode Competitor
tasks.description: Review the source code in ../opencode to analyze OpenCode features. Identify key functionalities, architecture patterns, and user experience elements. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/opencode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Analyze RooCode Competitor
tasks.description: Research and analyze RooCode features and capabilities. Focus on core functionality, user interface design, and competitive advantages. Document your findings in target/temp/swarmout/roocode_analysis.md

tasks.title: Product Review and Feature Gap Analysis
tasks.description: Review our current product and compare it with competitor analyses from s1-s4. Identify missing features and areas for improvement. Create a comprehensive analysis document in target/temp/swarmout/product_review.md

tasks.title: Create SWARMOUT2.md Feature Implementation Plan
tasks.description: Using the product review from s5, create a document called SWARMOUT2.md in target/temp/swarmout/. Include suggested feature additions, implementation milestones, and specific tasks for each milestone. Organize the plan with clear phases and deliverables.
